title: Consensus Change Standards: A Legal and Technical Framework for Bitcoin Protocol Governance
description: Third Edition (v3.1), June 2026. Proposes minimum standards for evaluating Bitcoin consensus-change proposals: submission requirements, tiered minimum review periods, code-audit standards, activation-threshold floors backed by a quantified chain-split risk model, a 20-criterion readiness scorecard with three worked examples (Taproot, BIP-110, SegWit2x), a legal-liability analysis (negligence, tortious interference, fiduciary duty, pool-operator contract exposure, regulatory consequences), a documentary record for the BIP-110 case study, and model adoption policy language for exchanges, mining pools, and node-software platforms.
